items.content_html: A simple program written in AutoHotKey to translate the signal from an ultrasound receiver into a readable format for another program. Written as part of my work as a research associate at BAM, Berlin.
items.title: estamine/bamhexwrite: A simple program written in AutoHotKey to translate the signal from an ultrasound receiver into a readable format for another program. Written as part of my work as a research associate at BAM, Berlin.

items.content_html: A simple program written in AutoHotKey for the time I worked as a Research Associate at BAM. To remind me to check my todo list, drink more water and other tweaks like remaping the accents on a foreign keyboard, shortcuts to programs and websites I used regularly, and a multple entry clipboard.
items.title: estamine/remindersandshortcuts: A simple program written in AutoHotKey for the time I worked as a Research Associate at BAM. To remind me to check my todo list, drink more water and other tweaks like remaping the accents on a foreign keyboard, shortcuts to programs and websites I used regularly, and a multple entry clipboard.

items.content_html: A program written in AutoHotKey to help with the task of doing multiple screenshots and renaming them sequentially. Written to help my colleagues at the testing department of the company Carefusion (now Vyaire) where I worked as an Verification/Validation Engineer.
items.title: estamine/screenshooter: A program written in AutoHotKey to help with the task of doing multiple screenshots and renaming them sequentially. Written to help my colleagues at the testing department of the company Carefusion (now Vyaire) where I worked as an Verification/Validation Engineer.

items.content_html: F10(suspend/resume process). F12(on/off borderless fullscreen). F11(un/lock mouse cursor in active window). Pause(ALT+F4/hold restarts PC). Control 4button Mouse with keyboard. Insert a character by long pressing the key. LWin(CTRL+F, hold/double shows/hide taskbar). Menu(CTRL+C/V/A). ALT+Shift(half window size+position+maximize). ALT+Ctrl(desktop)
items.title: hornster02/hornster02: F10(suspend/resume process). F12(on/off borderless fullscreen). F11(un/lock mouse cursor in active window). Pause(ALT+F4/hold restarts PC). Control 4button Mouse with keyboard. Insert a character by long pressing the key. LWin(CTRL+F, hold/double shows/hide taskbar). Menu(CTRL+C/V/A). ALT+Shift(half window size+position+maximize). ALT+Ctrl(desktop)
